hindi: देवि सुरेश्वरि भगवति गङ्गे त्रिभुवनतारिणि तरलतरङ्गे।
english: O divine Goddess, queen of gods, Bhagavati Ganga, liberator of the three worlds, with restless waves
roman: Devi Sureshvari Bhagavati Gange tribhuvana tarini tarala tarange

hindi: शंकरमौलिविहारिणि विमले मम मतिरास्तां तव पदकमले॥
english: O pure one who sports on the head of Shankara — may my mind rest at your lotus feet
roman: Shankara mooli viharini vimale mama matir aastam tava padakamale

english: O Bhagirathi, giver of happiness, Mother — the greatness of your waters is known in the Vedas
roman: Bhagirathi sukhadayini matas tava jala mahima nigame khyatah

hindi: नाहं जाने तव महिमानं पाहि कृपामयि मामज्ञानम्॥
english: I do not know your greatness — O compassionate one, protect this ignorant one
roman: Naham jane tava mahimanam pahi kripamayi mam agyanam

english: O Ganga flowing from the feet of Hari, with waves as white as snow and moon and pearls
roman: Hari pada padya tarangini Gange hima vidhu mukta dhavala tarange

hindi: दूरीकुरु मम दुष्कृतिभारं कुरु कृपया भवसागरपारम्॥
english: Remove the burden of my evil deeds — with compassion take me across the ocean of existence
roman: Duri kuru mama dushkruti bharam kuru kripaya bhava sagara param

english: This Ganga Ashtakam — whoever reads it daily with devotion to the divine Goddess
roman: Ganga ashtakam idam yah pathet nityam bhaktya Sureshvarim

english: Is freed from all sins and goes to the world of Shiva
roman: Muchyate sarva papebhyah Shiva lokam sa gachchhati
